title_en: Why Did It Take So Long to Ban Trans Fats?
title_es: ¿Por qué tomó tanto tiempo prohibir las grasas trans?
hook_en: Did you know trans fats were legal until 2015?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que las grasas trans fueron legales hasta 2015?
key_message: The slow pace of the FDA in banning trans fats highlights systemic issues in US food safety regulations.
visual_elements: split screen of healthy vs. processed food
clip of her shaking head in disbelief
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 2015: FDA removes trans fats (partially hydrogenated oils) from GRAS list — Impact: Took decades of evidence — shows how slow the US system is to act

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: US Food Additives: What's Allowed and Why?
title_es: Aditivos en la comida de EE.UU.: ¿Qué se permite y por qué?
hook_en: What's in your food that Europe bans?
hook_es: ¿Qué hay en tu comida que Europa prohíbe?
key_message: Many additives banned in Europe are still legal in US foods due to laxer regulations.
visual_elements: list of banned additives in Europe
dramatic zoom on food ingredient labels
props_needed: food packaging with visible ingredient labels
